tasks.subject: Task 1: DB schema + Alembic migration for lobby fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `join_code` to sessions and `display_name` to session_participants, with ORM + pydantic updates so the service layer can use them.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations/versions/0004_add_lobby_fields.py`
- Modify: `engine/db/orm.py`
- Modify: `engine/session/models.py`
- Modify: `engine/session/service.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `alembic upgrade head` runs without error
- [ ] `alembic downgrade -1` reverses without error
- [ ] `Session.join_code` is accessible on ORM object after `create_session`
- [ ] `SessionParticipant.display_name` is nullable Text in the DB

**Verify:** `alembic upgrade head` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/versions/0004_add_lobby_fields.py", "engine/db/orm.py", "engine/session/models.py", "engine/session/service.py"], "verifyCommand": "alembic upgrade head", "acceptanceCriteria": ["alembic upgrade head runs without error", "alembic downgrade -1 reverses without error", "Session.join_code populated after create_session", "SessionParticipant.display_name is nullable Text"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Lobby API endpoints (public lobby state + lobby-join)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose two public (no auth) endpoints — GET /v1/sessions/{id}/lobby and POST /v1/lobby-join — plus CORS middleware.

**Files:**
- Create: `api/routers/lobby.py`
- Modify: `api/schemas/__init__.py`
- Modify: `api/main.py`
- Modify: `engine/session/service.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] GET /v1/sessions/{id}/lobby returns lobby state without auth
- [ ] POST /v1/lobby-join with valid code creates participant and returns {participant_id, session_id, display_name}
- [ ] POST /v1/lobby-join with wrong code returns 404
- [ ] player_count increments on each join

**Verify:** `curl.exe -s http://localhost:8000/v1/sessions/<session-id>/lobby` → JSON with join_code field

```json:metadata
{"files": ["api/routers/lobby.py", "api/schemas/__init__.py", "api/main.py", "engine/session/service.py"], "verifyCommand": "curl.exe -s http://localhost:8000/v1/sessions/<id>/lobby", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /v1/sessions/{id}/lobby returns lobby state without auth", "POST /v1/lobby-join with valid code creates participant", "POST /v1/lobby-join with wrong code returns 404", "player_count increments on each join"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard scaffold (Vite entry, router, API client, base CSS)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Vite entry files, URL-based router, API client module, and base CSS theme.

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/index.html`
- Create: `dashboard/src/main.tsx`
- Create: `dashboard/src/App.tsx`
- Create: `dashboard/src/index.css`
- Create: `dashboard/src/api/lobby.ts`
- Modify: `dashboard/vite.config.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] npm run dev starts without error
- [ ] localhost:5173 renders text not 404
- [ ] localhost:5173/display/test-id routes to display content
- [ ] npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npm run typecheck` → `Found 0 errors.`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/index.html", "dashboard/src/main.tsx", "dashboard/src/App.tsx", "dashboard/src/index.css", "dashboard/src/api/lobby.ts", "dashboard/vite.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts without error", "localhost:5173 renders text not 404", "localhost:5173/display/test-id routes correctly", "npm run typecheck passes with 0 errors"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Display screen (TV lobby — join code, QR, live player list)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the shared TV display screen with join code, QR code, and live player list polling every 2 seconds.

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/src/screens/DisplayScreen.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Join code visible in large gold text
- [ ] QR code image loads from qrserver.com
- [ ] Player list updates within 3s of join
- [ ] No console errors

**Verify:** Open `http://localhost:5173/display/<session-id>` in Chrome — join code visible, QR loads, player list updates after joining via curl.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/screens/DisplayScreen.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "Open http://localhost:5173/display/<session-id> and confirm join code + QR visible", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Join code visible in large gold text", "QR code image loads", "Player list updates within 3s of join", "No console errors"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Join and waiting screens (player phone flow)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the player phone experience — name input form at /join?code=<code> and confirmation screen at /waiting.

**Files:**
- Create: `dashboard/src/screens/JoinScreen.tsx`
- Create: `dashboard/src/screens/WaitingScreen.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Join form loads at /join?code=ABC123 on mobile
- [ ] Valid name+code submission redirects to /waiting with name in URL
- [ ] Invalid code shows error without crash
- [ ] Waiting screen shows player name and waiting message
- [ ] npm run typecheck 0 errors

**Verify:** On phone browser via cloudflared tunnel: scan QR → name form appears → submit name → see confirmation screen.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/screens/JoinScreen.tsx", "dashboard/src/screens/WaitingScreen.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Join form loads at /join?code=ABC123", "Valid submission redirects to /waiting", "Invalid code shows error", "Waiting screen shows player name", "npm run typecheck 0 errors"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
